qualifier.label: World Cup Qualifier
qualifier.title: Your Road to Geneva Starts Here
qualifier.body: Bachata Social Congress is the official host of the Latin American Qualifier for the Bachata Social World Cup — the world's most prestigious bachata social competition.
qualifier.prize_2: Direct qualification to Geneva World Finals

workshops.label: Training
workshops.title: 3 Days of Bachata Social
workshops.subtitle: +45 hours of training · 3 nights of social dancing
workshops.sensual_desc: Master connection, embrace, and body expression in the most intimate bachata style.
workshops.tradicional_desc: Return to the roots with Dominican flavor. Footwork, timing, and cultural authenticity.
workshops.fusion_desc: Explore the creative fusion between bachata and other genres. No limits, pure expression.

artists.label: Lineup
artists.title: Artists & DJs
artists.subtitle: The best from Latin America and the world

dresscode.label: Dress Code
dresscode.title: Prepare Your Best Look for the Social
dresscode.subtitle: Every night has its own energy

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: When will official hotels be announced?
faq.a1: Official event hotels will be announced soon. We recommend following our social media to stay updated on all news and special rates for participants.
faq.q2: How does the World Cup Qualifier competition work?
faq.a2: The competition is in Jack & Jill Social format (Lead & Follow). Participants are evaluated on connection, musicality, technique, and improvisation. Winners qualify directly to the World Finals in Geneva, Switzerland (Oct 10-11, 2026) and receive USD $2,000 travel support.
faq.q3: What does each pass type include?
faq.a3: The Diamond Pass includes full access to all workshops (+45h), 3 social nights, competition access, and VIP zone. Gold Pass includes workshops and 3 social nights. Day Pass gives access to workshops and social for one specific day. Night Pass is social nights only.
faq.q4: Can I participate if I'm a beginner?
faq.a4: Absolutely! BSC has workshops for all levels, from beginners to advanced. Instructors will adapt content so everyone can enjoy and learn. The competition has open categories and also specific levels.

footer.tagline: Latin America's most important bachata social event
